splits.title: Social Service - The Spirit of Social Work
splits.start_boundary: LESSON IV Social Service (Fourth Week in December )
splits.end_boundary: Why is long, continued supervision of a family sometimes necessary?

files.notes: This file contains two distinct lesson sections from the Guide Lessons for December: Lesson III on Literature focusing on American war poets (Joyce Kilmer, Alan Seeger, Charles Divine), and Lesson IV on Social Service discussing the spirit and philosophy of social work. Each lesson has its own questions and problems section.
